Idioma.MSG_DebeDigitarElCodigoDeLaCarga: Should enter the code of the load
Idioma.MSG_DebeDigitarLaDescripcionDeLaCarga: Should enter the description of the load
Idioma.MSG_DebeDigitarElCodigoDeLaLineaDeLaCarg: Should enter the code of the line of the load
Idioma.MSG_DebeSeleccionarElSocioDeNegocio: Should select the associate of business
Idioma.MSG_DebeSeleccionarAlgunMetodoDeCalculo: Should select some method of calculation
Idioma.MSG_DebeDigitarLaDescripcionDeLalineaDeL: Should enter the description of the line of the load
Idioma.MSG_DebeDigitarElValorDelEmpleadoMayorOI: Enter the value of the older employee or the same as zero
Idioma.MSG_DebeDigitarElValorDelPatronoMayorQue: Enter the value of the greater owner that zero
Idioma.MSG_ElRangoMinimoDebeSerMenorAlRangoMaxi: The most minimum rank should be smaller al maximum rank
Idioma.LB_ElRangoMinimoDebeSerMenorAlRangoMaxim: The most minimum rank should be smaller al maximum rank
Idioma.MSG_DebeDigitarUnPorcentajeEntre0Y100: Should enter a percentage between 0 and 100%
Idioma.MSG_DeseaBorrarEstaLineaDeLaCarga: ¿Do you desires to erase this line of the load?
Idioma.MSG_DeseaBorrarEstacarga: ¿Do you desires to erase this load?
Idioma.MSG_NoEsPosibleBborrarEstaCargaDebidoAQu: There is not possible to erase this load due to that has lines in the loads of the employees
